rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax for AGREE contract blocks
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting annex blocks
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-level signal routing bindings
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
